h9c11e627g13e9g4b94ga31egdeb8f545da48: I'm not singing your praises. You and the tieflings brought violence to this place.
h9bc54a04gb572g4de2gbdf9g8a62aef313ab: It wasn't our fight. You dragged us into it.
hed7e60f8g2844g47feg9f90g122c73a657b9: Every drop of druid blood is on your hands. Remember that.
